visa_types.overview:
Overview
EDUCATIONAL DOCUMENT- Diploma Certificates, Transcripts, Confirmation Letter, Master’s Degree, Doctorate Degree etc.
PERSONAL DOCUMENT- Birth Certificate, Marriage Certificate, Divorce Certificate, Police clearances, Medical certificates etc.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
EDUCATIONAL DOCUMENT- Diploma Certificates, Transcripts, Confirmation Letter, Master’s Degree, Doctorate Degree etc.
PERSONAL DOCUMENT- Birth Certificate, Marriage Certificate, Divorce Certificate, Police clearances, Medical certificates etc.

## Documents Required

- Original Certificate
- Passport copy
- NAWA Application form ( Educational)

## Attestation Process

- Translation
- NAWA verification ( Educational )
- Ministry of Foreign Affairs
- UAE Embassy, Poland
- UAE MOFA

Declaration & disclaimers
Application form

EDUCATIONAL DOCUMENT- Diploma Certificates, Transcripts, Confirmation Letter, Master’s Degree, Doctorate Degree etc.
PERSONAL DOCUMENT- Birth Certificate, Marriage Certificate, Divorce Certificate, Police clearances, Medical certificates etc.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
EDUCATIONAL DOCUMENT- Diploma Certificates, Transcripts, Confirmation Letter, Master’s Degree, Doctorate Degree etc.
PERSONAL DOCUMENT- Birth Certificate, Marriage Certificate, Divorce Certificate, Police clearances, Medical certificates etc.

## Documents Required
- Original certificate
- Passport copy
- Supporting documents maybe required during the process

## Attestation Process
- Sworn Translation
- Notarization
- Ministry of Education (Educational)
- Ministry of Foreign Affairs
- UAE Embassy
- MOFA UAE

## Download Forms
Declaration & disclaimers
Application form

- Passport copy

visa_types.name: GERMANY
visa_types.documents_required:
EDUCATIONAL CERTIFICATE
- Original certificate
- A true copy of the certificate issued by the registrar not older than 6 months
- Passport copy
- If true copies are not accepted by BVA- the attestation will be on the original document itself.
PERSONAL CERTIFICATE
- Original certificate not older than 3 months
- Passport copy
visa_types.overview:
Overview
EDUCATIONAL DOCUMENT- Diploma Certificates, Transcripts, Confirmation Letter, Master’s Degree, Doctorate Degree etc.
PERSONAL DOCUMENT- Birth Certificate, Marriage Certificate, Divorce Certificate, Police clearances, Medical certificates etc.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
EDUCATIONAL DOCUMENT- Diploma Certificates, Transcripts, Confirmation Letter, Master’s Degree, Doctorate Degree etc.
PERSONAL DOCUMENT- Birth Certificate, Marriage Certificate, Divorce Certificate, Police clearances, Medical certificates etc.

## Documents Required
EDUCATIONAL CERTIFICATE
- Original certificate
- A true copy of the certificate issued by the registrar not older than 6 months
- Passport copy
- If true copies are not accepted by BVA- the attestation will be on the original document itself.
PERSONAL CERTIFICATE
- Original certificate not older than 3 months
- Passport copy

## Attestation Process

- True copy from the University (case specific- Need to check with BVA)
- Direct Government Office
- Federal Office of Administration (BVA)
- UAE Embassy, Germany
- UAE MOFA

Declaration & disclaimers
Application form

visa_types.name: PHILIPPINES
visa_types.documents_required:
EDUCATIONAL CERTIFICATE
- Original Certificate
- Original Transcripts Full
- Passport Copy Self attested 3 Copies (Original)
- POA to be signed ( Original-format will provide )
- Authorization Letter handwritten by the client ( Scanned Only)
- Passport Photo page , Address page, Visa page, EID (Proper Scanned if available)
PERSONAL CERTIFICATE
- Original Certificate
- Passport Copy of all the parties (If BC parents passport Copy also Required)
- Authorization Letter (will provide)
Education (CHED Completed)
- Sealed envelope from the CHED
- Original certificate and consoldated marksheet
- Passport copy
visa_types.overview:
Overview
EDUCATIONAL DOCUMENT- Diploma Certificates, Transcripts, Confirmation Letter, Master’s Degree, Doctorate Degree etc.
PERSONAL DOCUMENT- Birth Certificate, Marriage Certificate, Divorce Certificate, Police clearances, Medical certificates etc.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
EDUCATIONAL DOCUMENT- Diploma Certificates, Transcripts, Confirmation Letter, Master’s Degree, Doctorate Degree etc.
PERSONAL DOCUMENT- Birth Certificate, Marriage Certificate, Divorce Certificate, Police clearances, Medical certificates etc.

## Documents Required
EDUCATIONAL CERTIFICATE
- Original Certificate
- Original Transcripts Full
- Passport Copy Self attested 3 Copies (Original)
- POA to be signed ( Original-format will provide )
- Authorization Letter handwritten by the client ( Scanned Only)
- Passport Photo page , Address page, Visa page, EID (Proper Scanned if available)
PERSONAL CERTIFICATE
- Original Certificate
- Passport Copy of all the parties (If BC parents passport Copy also Required)
- Authorization Letter (will provide)
Education (CHED Completed)
- Sealed envelope from the CHED
- Original certificate and consoldated marksheet
- Passport copy

## Attestation Process

- Notarisation
- State Department Verification
- Commission of Higher Education, or
- DepED, or
- TESDA CAV
- Department of Foreign Affairs- Apostille
- UAE Embassy, Philippines
- UAE MOFA

## Download Forms
Declaration & disclaimers
Application form

- Additional requirements will be case specific

PERSONAL DOCUMENT- Birth Certificate, Marriage Certificate, Divorce Certificate, Police clearances, Medical certificates etc.

## Documents Required

- Original Certificate
- Passport copy
- Additional requirements will be advised case-specific

## Attestation Process

- Registry ( Personal )
- Muncipality ( Personal )
- Ministry of Education
- Ministry of Foreign Affairs
- UAE Embassy, Tunisia
- UAE MOFA
